title: The t-structures generated by objects
abstract: Let $\mathcal T$ be a well generated triangulated category, and let $S\subset\mathcal T$ be a set of objects. We prove that there is a t-structure on $\mathcal T$ with ${\mathcal T}^{\leq0}=\overline{\langle S\rangle}^{(-\infty,0]}$.   This article is an improvement on the main result of a 2003 article by Alonso, Jeremias and Souto---in that article the theorem was proved under the assumption that $\mathcal T$ has a nice enough model. It should be mentioned that the theorem of Alonso, Jeremias and Souto has been influential---it turns out to be interesting to study all of these t-structures.
